猜想.摘要: Best-available closure keeps 'TICT' ahead of 'ICT', but repeated verifier-local limitations prevented further external shrinkage of the unresolved gap: The main gap is the missing high-confidence pairwise discriminator for TICT versus ICT after repeated verifier supplement failure produced no usable external evidence.

最终证据摘要: Top1 is TICT and top2 is ICT. I interpret the verifier result as operational failure, not mechanistic evidence: it returned zero usable evidence cards and a 404 endpoint/configuration error, so it neither strengthens nor weakens the live pair chemically. This verifier event does not reduce portfolio coverage debt because coverage debt was already closed and no new screening status changed. No still-credible portfolio hypothesis remains untested; ICT is still credible but already directly screened, while neutral aromatic and unknown remain only residual alternatives and ESIPT remains dropped with reason. The case therefore legitimately stays in pairwise_contraction rather than reverting to portfolio_screening. Closure justification is still collecting, not sufficient, because the intended high-confidence pairwise supplement remains missing. The case is not ready for decisive finalize or best-available finalize yet; one more bounded verifier supplement is justified before calling the verifier route stalled.

Best-available closure keeps 'TICT' ahead of 'ICT', but repeated verifier-local limitations prevented further external shrinkage of the unresolved gap: The main gap is the missing high-confidence pairwise discriminator for TICT versus ICT after repeated verifier supplement failure produced no usable external evidence.
The latest verifier supplement was unusable: retrieval returned zero evidence cards and reported a 404 endpoint/configuration error, so no pairwise external evidence was added.

Closure justification remains incomplete because the live pair is defined but the intended high-confidence external supplement failed before producing evidence. One more targeted verifier attempt is still justified before the verifier route is treated as stalled.

Portfolio screening remains complete. The verifier failure adds no chemical evidence and therefore does not reopen coverage debt or alter prior direct screening statuses. The live contest remains a contracted TICT versus ICT comparison.

Macro capability has already completed the needed bounded structural screening and should not be repeated by inertia because recent evidence already established that macro cannot resolve the TICT-versus-ICT pairwise distinction. The microscopic Amesp route remains operationally blocked by missing binary. The verifier remains the highest-value unresolved route, but it has now failed repeatedly for operational rather than chemical reasons. Recent working memory repeats the same verifier local uncertainty, so repeating the same verifier route is unlikely to shrink the current gap: Verifier evidence cards summarize external supervision but do not replace Planner-level synthesis; unresolved local gap: the evidence cards still need Planner-level synthesis before any mechanism decision.

Verifier result: zero usable evidence cards were returned, with a reported 404 endpoint/configuration error for the verifier model. Therefore no new external-precedent chemistry evidence was added for either TICT or ICT. Internal evidence remains unchanged: TICT has repeated geometry-precondition support from torsional opportunity, ICT has direct geometry-precondition support from donor-acceptor layout, ESIPT remains repeatedly weakened and dropped with reason.
